title: Apple Ap - Restricted View Options - Map View Missing
excerpt: Map view is missing from the apple ap.  Actually the only view available is the Main Board view.  It would be amazing to have multiple view options.

posts.author: lisamariem001 (Lisa Atkinson)
posts.cookedHtml: Map view is missing from the apple ap. Actually the only view available is the Main Board view. It would be amazing to have multiple view options.

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a priority for us too. I’ve been told they are working on this.

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: The most recent update has more views but no map.

posts.author: Arborist63 (Peter Toler)
posts.cookedHtml: Map view on the mobile app would be amazing for our organization

posts.author: Eda6195 (Emily Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Would be an absolute game changer if we could get this view on mobile and/or dashboards!
